heading: Responsibilities of covered institutions, institution-affiliated organizations, and lenders
label: 1019a Responsibilities of covered institutions, institution-affiliated organizations, and lenders

children.heading: Responsibilities of covered institutions and institution-affiliated organizations
children.label: a Responsibilities of covered institutions and institution-affiliated organizations

children.heading: Disclosures by covered institutions and institution-affiliated organizations
children.label: 1 Disclosures by covered institutions and institution-affiliated organizations
I
children.text: the maximum amount of Federal grant and loan aid under subchapter IV available to students, in an easy to understand format;

children.label: II
children.text: the information required to be disclosed pursuant to , for each type of loan described in that is offered pursuant to a preferred lender arrangement of the institution or organization to students of the institution or the families of such students; andsection 1019b(a)(2)(A)(i) of this titlesection 1019(3)(A) of this title

children.label: III
children.text: a statement that such institution is required to process the documents required to obtain a loan under part B of subchapter IV from any eligible lender the student selects; and

children.label: I
children.text: in the case of a covered institution, the information that the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System requires to be disclosed under , for each type of private education loan offered pursuant to a preferred lender arrangement of the institution to students of the institution or the families of such students; andsection 1638(e)(11) of title 15

children.label: II
children.text: in the case of an institution-affiliated organization of a covered institution, the information the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System requires to be disclosed under , for each type of private education loan offered pursuant to a preferred lender arrangement of the organization to students of such institution or the families of such students.section 1638(e)(1) of title 15

children.label: i
children.text: provide the prospective borrower with the information the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System requires to be disclosed under for such loan;section 1638(e)(1) of title 15

children.label: I
children.text: the prospective borrower may qualify for loans or other assistance under subchapter IV; and

children.label: II
children.text: the terms and conditions of loans made, insured, or guaranteed under subchapter IV may be more favorable than the provisions of private education loans; and

children.label: iii
children.text: ensure that information regarding private education loans is presented in such a manner as to be distinct from information regarding loans that are made, insured, or guaranteed under subchapter IV.

children.label: i
children.text: are distributed to prospective or current students of a covered institution and families of such students; and

children.label: ii
children.text: describe or discuss the financial aid opportunities available to students at an institution of higher education.

children.heading: Use of institution name
children.label: 2 Use of institution name
children.text: A covered institution, or an institution-affiliated organization of such covered institution, that enters into a preferred lender arrangement with a lender regarding private education loans shall not agree to the lender’s use of the name, emblem, mascot, or logo of such institution or organization, or other words, pictures, or symbols readily identified with such institution or organization, in the marketing of private education loans to students attending such institution in any way that implies that the loan is offered or made by such institution or organization instead of the lender.

children.heading: Use of lender name
children.label: 3 Use of lender name
children.text: A covered institution, or an institution-affiliated organization of such covered institution, that enters into a preferred lender arrangement with a lender regarding private education loans shall ensure that the name of the lender is displayed in all information and documentation related to such loans.

children.heading: Federal education loans
children.label: i Federal education loans
children.text: For each education loan that is made, insured, or guaranteed under part B or D of subchapter IV (other than a loan made under or a Federal Direct Consolidation Loan), at or prior to the time the lender disburses such loan, the lender shall provide the prospective borrower or borrower, in writing (including through electronic means), with the disclosures described in subsections (a) and (c) of .section 1078–3 of this titlesection 1083 of this title

children.heading: Private education loans
children.label: ii Private education loans
children.text: For each of a lender’s private education loans, the lender shall comply with the disclosure requirements under .section 1638(e) of title 15

children.label: aa
children.text: is employed in the financial aid office of a covered institution; or

children.label: bb
children.text: otherwise has responsibilities with respect to education loans or other financial aid of the institution; and

children.label: II
children.text: any similar expenses paid or provided to any agent of an institution-affiliated organization who is involved in the practice of recommending, promoting, or endorsing education loans.

children.label: I
children.text: the amount for each specific instance in which the lender provided such expenses;

children.label: II
children.text: the name of any agent described in clause (i) to whom the expenses were paid or provided;

children.label: III
children.text: the dates of the activity for which the expenses were paid or provided; and

children.label: IV
children.text: a brief description of the activity for which the expenses were paid or provided.

children.heading: Report to Congress
children.label: iii Report to Congress
children.text: The Secretary shall summarize the information received from the lenders under this subparagraph in a report and transmit such report annually to the authorizing committees.

children.label: A
children.text: in addition to any other disclosure required under Federal law, each lender of a loan made, insured, or guaranteed under part B of subchapter IV that participates in one or more preferred lender arrangements shall annually certify the lender’s compliance with the requirements of this chapter; and

children.label: B
children.text: if an audit of a lender is required pursuant to , the lender’s compliance with the requirements under this section shall be reported on and attested to annually by the auditor of such lender.section 1078(b)(1)(U)(iii) of this title
